chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5856 - وَ نَزَلَ جَبْرَئِيلُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَى اَلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ "يَا جَبْرَئِيلُ عِظْنِي" فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا مُحَمَّدُ عِشْ مَا شِئْتَ فَإِنَّكَ مَيِّتٌ وَ أَحْبِبْ مَنْ شِئْتَ فَإِنَّكَ مُفَارِقُهُ وَ اِعْمَلْ مَا شِئْتَ فَإِنَّكَ مُلاَقِيهِ شَرَفُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ صَلاَتُهُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ عِزُّهُ كَفُّ اَلْأَذَى عَنِ اَلنَّاسِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5856 - Jibr'il (Gabriel), peace be upon him, descended upon the Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, and the Prophet said to him: "O' Jibr'il, advise me."
Jibr'il said to him:
"O' Muhammad (sw), live as you wish, for you will surely die.
Love whomever you wish, for you will surely part from them.
Do whatever you wish, for you will surely be recompensed for it.
The honor of a believer lies in his prayer during the night, and his dignity is in refraining from harming others."
